title: Tree UI and right drawer
goal: Implement the tree view interface with board styling and preserve create/edit/detail flows through the right drawer.
requirements: Add a segmented board/tree switcher near the current filters.
Use current board visual tokens and compact work-card styling for workorder rows.
Use the existing drawer and detail-panel-content HTMX target.
Create button on top toolbar must work in tree mode.
Create action on department/device row must pass safe initial department/device values.
After create, return to tree mode when the user started in tree mode.
After edit, refresh the selected row or tree partial without breaking the drawer.
Support localStorage expansion state keyed by board and view.
Implement keyboard expand/collapse and row opening.
acceptance: Tree mode visually matches the board style.
Clicking a workorder row opens the existing detail drawer.
Editing a workorder from tree mode uses the existing drawer form.
Creating from a device node preselects that device where permitted.
Keyboard user can expand/collapse and open a workorder.
No text overlaps on common desktop and mobile widths.
verification: E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 E2E_USERNAME=chief_manager E2E_PASSWORD=... npm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium --grep "workorder tree"
manual or Playwright screenshot check for desktop and mobile tree view
